hooks.command: if [ -f .claude/state/planning-mode ]; then case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}" in *.claude/plans/*|*.claude/state/*) ;; *) echo 'BLOCK: Write disabled during planning mode. Allowed: .claude/plans/ and .claude/state/ only.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi

if [ -f .claude/state/gate-review-mode ]; then case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}" in *plans/gate-verdicts/*|*.claude/state/*) ;; *) echo 'BLOCK: Write disabled during gate review mode. Allowed: plans/gate-verdicts/ and .claude/state/ only.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi

if [ -f .claude/state/planning-mode ]; then case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}" in *.claude/plans/*|*.claude/state/*) ;; *) echo 'BLOCK: Edit disabled during planning mode. Allowed: .claude/plans/ and .claude/state/ only.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi

if [ -f .claude/state/planning-mode ]; then case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}" in *.claude/plans/*|*.claude/state/*) ;; *) echo 'BLOCK: MultiEdit disabled during planning mode. Allowed: .claude/plans/ and .claude/state/ only.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi
